title: Day 3 Lesson 2 ( Video )Asking where is a place
html:
Day ３ - Lesson 2

ばしょを　きく = Asking where is a place

ばしょ (Location): がっこうのロビー　= School's lobby

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): じむいん (Clerk), あんなさん しんにゅうせい (Anna-san new student)

The new words in this lesson are:

きょうしつ (kyooshitsu) = classroom

どこ (doko) = where

にかい (nikai) = second floor

かい (kai) = floor

じしゅうしつ (jishuushitsu) = self-study room

ちか いっかい (chika ikkai) = basement 1st floor

ちか (chika) = basement

かいだん (kaidan) = stairs
